creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
Nothing unusual.  I upgraded from FreeBSD 9.1 to 9.3 and (i think) vlc was installed from official packages (I installed from ports only when no pkg was available).  I do not exactly remember when I switched to pkgng.
Let's assume things like this are "noise" from updating and/or switching to pkgng and close the bug.
